aiAnalysis.description: A dark-themed database schema sidebar panel showing a list of database table names with grid/table icons on the left and globe/network icons on the right. The background is very dark (near black), with white text listing table names including admin_audit_logs, admin_invites, admin_login_attempts, admin_permission_overr..., admin_sessions, admin_users, app_settings, bond_events, commission_events, credit_pool_state, and eligibility_checks. Each row has a small square grid icon on the left and a circular globe icon on the right.
aiAnalysis.textContent: admin_audit_logs, admin_invites, admin_login_attempts, admin_permission_overr..., admin_sessions, admin_users, app_settings, bond_events, commission_events, credit_pool_state, eligibility_checks

recommendations.usageNotes: This is a screenshot of a database management UI panel, likely from a tool like TablePlus or similar. Best used as documentation reference or visual example in technical documentation, README files, or developer-facing content. Not suitable as a reusable UI asset. If used as a background or reference image, ensure sufficient contrast with overlaid content. The transparent background allows placement on similarly dark surfaces.
